nodes.name: claudeService.ts
nodes.summary: Handles communication with the local Claude proxy server to process raw tweets. Iterates tweets one at a time (BATCH_SIZE=1), sanitizes text, POSTs to /process-tweet with retry logic (up to 3 attempts), and generates fallback results when the proxy is unavailable.

nodes.name: sanitizeText
nodes.summary: Strips hashtags, mentions, control characters, and truncates tweet text to 700 characters before sending to the proxy.

nodes.name: processBookmarksWithClaude
nodes.summary: Exported async function that orchestrates batch processing of raw tweets through the Claude proxy. Supports abort signals, progress callbacks, retry logic with delays, and produces fallback entries on failure.

nodes.name: storage.ts
nodes.summary: Provides a unified storage abstraction that routes reads/writes to either a VPS REST API (when VITE_STORAGE_SECRET is set) or browser localStorage. Manages bookmarks, categories, and deleted IDs with get/save/clear operations.

nodes.name: apiRequest
nodes.summary: Generic authenticated fetch helper for the VPS storage API. Builds URL from env config, attaches x-api-secret header, and throws on non-OK responses.

nodes.name: translations.ts
nodes.summary: Centralised i18n strings for the UI, primarily in Catalan. Covers app labels, log messages, modal text, alert confirmations, default category lists, and the AI system prompt template used for Gemini/Claude categorization.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the core TypeScript interfaces for the application: TweetRaw (raw Twitter export shape), Bookmark (persisted entity), Category (string alias), ProcessedTweetResult (AI output), and LogEntry (import log).

nodes.name: vite-env.d.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript ambient declarations for Vite's import.meta.env, exposing VITE_API_KEY, VITE_STORAGE_API_URL, and VITE_STORAGE_SECRET as typed environment variables.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite configuration for the main web app. Enables React plugin, sets dev server to port 3000 on all interfaces, injects GEMINI_API_KEY into process.env, and adds a root path alias '@'.

nodes.name: tailwind.config.js
nodes.summary: Root Tailwind CSS configuration. Scans all HTML and src files for class usage with no custom theme extensions or plugins.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Root Vite/Vitest configuration file. Enables the React plugin and sets the test environment to 'node'.
